s: In 1986, Eric King suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.510, WHIP 1.240, SO 79, WAR 1.500.
In 1987, Eric King suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.890, WHIP 1.470, SO 89, WAR 0.600.
In 1988, Eric King suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.410, WHIP 1.370, SO 45, WAR 0.400.
Changed teams after the previous season (DET -> CHW).
In 1989, Eric King suited up for CHW as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.390, WHIP 1.310, SO 72, WAR 1.000. Notable context: Joined CHW.
In 1990, Eric King suited up for CHW as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.280, WHIP 1.160, SO 70, WAR 2.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (CHW -> CLE).
In 1991, Eric King suited up for CLE as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.600, WHIP 1.390, SO 59, WAR 2.600. Notable context: Joined CLE.
Changed teams after the previous season (CLE -> DET).
In 1992, Eric King suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.220, WHIP 1.490, SO 45, WAR 0.300. Notable context: Joined DET.
